stem: The function f is defined by f(x) = (x − 3)(x + 1)(x − 7). In the xy-plane, the graph of y = g(x) is the result of translating the graph of y = f(x) up 5 units. What is the product of all distinct values v for which g(v) = 5?
rationale: Because g(x) = f(x) + 5, the equation g(v) = 5 is equivalent to f(v) = 0. The zeros of f are v = 3, −1, and 7. Their product is 3 · (−1) · 7 = −21.
